# Summary

<!-- What changed and why? Keep this concise; avoid long AI-generated summaries. -->

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance
- [ ] Release or CI
- [ ] Other

## Testing

<!-- Check everything you ran. Add notes for anything not run. -->

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun run knip`
- [ ] Manual browser test in Chromium
- [ ] Manual browser test in Firefox

## Changeset

- [ ] Added a changeset with `bun run changeset` or `bun run changeset-add`
- [ ] No changeset needed because this does not affect the extension release

## Browser Notes

<!-- Include screenshots, recordings, affected pages, or browser-specific notes when relevant. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and easy to review.
- [ ] Any AI-assisted changes were reviewed before opening this PR.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for non-trivial logic.
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, cookies, tokens, or private account data are included.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior or workflow changed.
